Welcome home,
my love.

The world feels softer, warmer, and so much more beautiful now that you're back where you belong — right here, with me.

Scroll down
From the heart

A letter just for you

My dearest,

I've been carrying something heavy since the moment I knew you were in that hospital bed the weight of not being there the way I wish I could have been. I'm sorry. From the bottom of my heart, I'm truly, deeply sorry for every moment you felt alone, every time you reached out and I wasn't present the way you deserved.

But here is what I know, what I will never stop saying: you are the bravest, most resilient person I have ever known. The strength you showed through those days the discomfort, the uncertainty, the long hours that is the kind of courage that takes my breath away. I am so incredibly proud of you.

From this day forward, I promise to show up for you not just in the easy, sunny moments, but in the hard ones too. In the 3am restlessness, in the slow healing days, in the ordinary Tuesday afternoons. You will not carry anything alone again. I am here. All of me, every time.

Welcome home, my love. You did it. 🌸

— Always yours Alieee 💕

With all my heart

Get well wishes

🌙

Rest, deeply

Give your body the gift of stillness. Sleep without guilt, rest without worry healing happens in the quiet moments.

🍓

Your favourite things

Warm tea, your comfort show, cosy blankets. Today is for all the little joys that make you feel like yourself again.

🤝

I'm right here

You don't have to pretend you're okay. Whenever you need a hand, a hug, or just a quiet presence I am here.

💪

You are so strong

What you've been through would have broken most people. Not you. You carried it with grace, and I am in awe of you.

💗

My promise to you

I promise to be the person you can always count on — steady, present, and endlessly devoted. Through every season, every stumble, every beautiful ordinary day. You are my greatest love, and I will spend every moment making sure you know it.

❤️

Made with love, for the most important person in my world.
